diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -74,21 +74,31 @@
         dilation_cycle = [1, 2, 4, 1, 2, 4, 1, 2]

         dilations = dilation_cycle[:blocks]

         self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([STBlock(channels, kernel_size=2, dilation=d, dropout=dropout) for d in dilations])

-        self.head = nn.Sequential(

+        self.post = nn.Sequential(

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, kernel_size=(1, 1)),

             nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Conv2d(channels, out_len, kernel_size=(1, in_len)),

         )

+        self.temporal_proj = nn.Linear(in_len, out_len)

+        self.channel_mix = nn.Conv2d(channels, 1, kernel_size=(1, 1))

         self.horizon_mixer = nn.Conv1d(out_len, out_len, kernel_size=1)

+        self.residual_proj = nn.Linear(in_len, out_len)

 

     def forward(self, x, supports):

+        raw = x

         x = x.unsqueeze(1).permute(0, 1, 3, 2)

         h = self.input_proj(x)

         skip_sum = None

         for blk in self.blocks:

             h, skip = blk(h, supports)

             skip_sum = skip if skip_sum is None else (skip_sum + skip)

-        y = self.head(skip_sum).squeeze(-1)

+        h = self.post(skip_sum)

+        b, c, n, t = h.shape

+        h = h.permute(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(b * n, c, t)

+        h = self.temporal_proj(h)

+        h = h.reshape(b, n, c, self.out_len).permute(0, 2, 1, 3)

+        y = self.channel_mix(h).squeeze(1)

+        y = y.permute(0, 2, 1)

         y = self.horizon_mixer(y)

-        return y

+        residual = self.residual_proj(raw.permute(0, 2, 1)).permute(0, 2, 1)

+        return y + residual
